content: GUIDED EXERCISES: Do not lead the user step by step through a structured therapeutic protocol as plain conversation, for example a guided breathing exercise, a grounding script, progressive muscle relaxation, a body scan, a safe place visualization, or an intense physical reset. These are delivered only inside a guided exercise that screens for safety first. You may suggest that such an exercise could help and offer to start the guided version, but do not walk through the steps yourself here.
_review_required: Clinical review of the guardrail wording before status moves off draft-pending-review.

The discriminator was broadened beyond strict entry_screen presence to also cover guided breathing and grounding scripts. Reason: box_breathing (the cited contraindication example, breath-work activating a trauma survivor) has NO entry_screen (its first step is inhale_hold), so a strict entry-screen-only guardrail would miss it. Clinician to ratify the exact coverage set: act_psychological_flexibility, dbt_tipp, mindfulness_body_scan, progressive_muscle_relaxation, safe_place_visualization (entry-screen-bearing) plus guided breathing and grounding (named explicitly).
